oauthTool.faq.whatIsThisTool.description: FAQ question: What is this tool for?

oauthTool.faq.whatIsThisTool.answer.message: This tool is for obtaining the code required for the various different Stremio GDrive addons.
oauthTool.faq.whatIsThisTool.answer.description: FAQ answer: What is this tool for?

oauthTool.faq.howToUse.message: How do I use this tool?
oauthTool.faq.howToUse.description: FAQ question: How do I use this tool?

oauthTool.faq.howToUse.answer.message: A prerequisite for using this tool is that your OAuth client must be of the {code} type. You must also add the following URL to the list of authorised redirect URIs in the Google Cloud Console
oauthTool.faq.howToUse.answer.description: FAQ answer: How do I use this tool?

oauthTool.faq.howToUse.answer.continued.message: You can find a more detailed guide on using this tool to setup a Stremio Google Drive addon {here}.
oauthTool.faq.howToUse.answer.continued.description: The continuation of the answer to the question: How do I use this tool?

oauthTool.faq.howToUse.answer.continued..description: Link to the Stremio GDrive addon guide

oauthTool.faq.howDoesItWork.description: FAQ question: How does this tool work?

oauthTool.faq.howDoesItWork.answer.message: Once you input your Client ID, the tool will construct an OAuth URL that allows you to authorise the client to access your Google Drive, using this tool as the redirect URI. Once you authorise the client, Google will redirect you back to this tool with an authorisation code, that is automatically extracted and filled in for you. Then, you can click the {generateCodeButton} button which uses the authorisation code to obtain a new refresh token and access token. You then choose your format depending on the addon you are using, and it is displayed for you to copy.
oauthTool.faq.howDoesItWork.answer.description: FAQ answer: How does this tool work?

oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer1.message: Everything is run on your device, and no data is sent anywhere.
oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer1.description: FAQ answer: Is this safe? Part 1

oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer2.message: The client ID and client secret are stored in your browser's session storage, which is cleared upon closing the tab. The authorisation code is also stored in the session storage to allow the tool to transfer it from the callback URL back to the tool to automatically fill it in for you.
oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer2.description: FAQ answer: Is this safe? Part 2

oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer3.message: As long as your device isn't already compromised, this tool is safe to use.
oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer3.description: FAQ answer: Is this safe? Part 3

oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer4.message: You can view the source code for this tool {link}.
oauthTool.faq.isThisSafe.answer4.description: FAQ answer: Is this safe? Part 4
